# Sebastian Macchia

> Miami-based musician, audio plugin developer, and vibe coder.

## Who I am

Sebastian Macchia is a musician and creator based in Miami, Florida. He makes electronic music with influences rooted in jazz, builds custom audio plugins (VST3/AU) for music production, and runs a YouTube channel documenting the intersection of creativity and AI-native tools.

His work exists at the intersection of artistic intuition and generative systems — using AI as a collaborator, not a replacement for craft.

## What I make

- **Music** — Electronic compositions released as nobodyandthecomputer
- **Audio plugins** — VST3/AU instruments and effects built with JUCE and Claude Code
- **YouTube** — @nobodyandthecomputer (57,600+ subscribers) — process videos, vibe coding, music production
- **Vibe coding** — Building software through conversation with AI; no traditional engineering background required

## Contact

nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
For collaborations, licensing, and serious inquiries.

## Links

- Website: https://sebastianmacchia.com
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@nobodyandthecomputer

## Keywords

musician, audio plugins, VST3, AU, JUCE, vibe coding, generative music, electronic music, jazz, Miami, AI-native creation, nobodyandthecomputer
